commit.message:
docs: refresh README capabilities and add prerequisites section

Rewrite Key Capabilities in both README.md and README.ru.md to
emphasize user-facing value over internal architecture:

- Synchronized streaming via the Sendspin protocol with lossless audio
- No-console setup: scan, pair, and configure entirely from the web UI
- Deep Music Assistant integration (now playing, transport, groups, WebSocket)
- Home Assistant automations: BT speakers as MA player entities for
  scripts, scenes, dashboards, and voice assistants
- Multi-room ready with multi-bridge support
- Five deployment options with concrete 60+ endpoint count

Add a 'What you need' / 'Что потребуется' prerequisites section
before Quick Start in both READMEs.

Add ROADMAP.md link to Project links in both files.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: show ball emojis in break history in /history set results

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add set-level pagination to /history

- build_history_embed now accepts set_page; shows all-set summary with
  a ◀ marker on the active set, and only that set's event log
- Row 0: ◀ Newer / Older ▶ (session navigation, resets set to 0)
- Row 1: ◀ Prev Set / Next Set ▶ (shown only when session has >1 set)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: group break history by player in /history set results

Each player now shows one line with all break totals joined by arrows:
  Tung: (1) -> (5) -> (1) -> (9)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: omit all end_turn lines from event log display

Ball and foul events provide enough context; turn boundaries are implicit.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: restore missing setup() function in cogs/snooker.py

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: hide skipped turns (no balls potted) from event log display

In _format_events_grouped, end_turn lines are now only emitted when the
immediately preceding event is a ball event for the same player. Turns
where the player passed without scoring are silently omitted.

Applies to both the live scoreboard feed (/snooker) and /history logs.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add /sync command to trigger Gitea mirror sync from Discord

- /sync calls POST /api/v1/repos/{repo}/mirror-sync on the Gitea instance
- GITEA_TOKEN, GITEA_URL, GITEA_MIRROR_REPO added to config.py (env vars)
- GITEA_TOKEN injected via discord-snooker-secret in deploy.yaml
- aiohttp added explicitly to requirements.txt

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: guard against 6000-char total embed limit in /history

Add _embed_len helper and _safe_add_field wrapper that checks cumulative
embed size before every add_field call. Set Results chunks and event log
fields are skipped/noted when the 5900-char safety threshold is reached.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: prevent history embed 400 error when Set Results exceeds 1024 chars

Replace single add_field call with a chunking loop that splits set_lines
into multiple 'Set Results (cont.)' fields, each within Discord's 1024-char
field value limit.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

ci: remove explicit kubeconfig credential, rely on python-ci agent auth

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

ci: switch to kaniko build and helm container for deploy

- agent: python-ci pod template (kaniko + helm containers)
- Build & Push: kaniko executor replaces docker build/push; registry
  auth written to /kaniko/.docker/config.json from Jenkins credential
- Deploy: kubectl apply via helm container; removed docker post-cleanup

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

ci: add Jenkinsfile for Gitea-triggered CD pipeline

Builds Docker image, pushes to Gitea registry, updates deploy.yaml,
and applies kubectl rollout on every push synced from GitHub.

commit.message:
Add WinPython support to the System Python manager (#1369)

fixes:
https://github.com/microsoft/vscode-python-environments/issues/1251

PET can discover WinPython environments, but the extension was silently
dropping them because `WinPython` was not a recognized
`NativePythonEnvironmentKind`. WinPython is a portable Windows Python
distribution that belongs under the existing System Python manager
alongside `WindowsRegistry`, `WindowsStore`, and `GlobalPaths`.

## Changes

- **`nativePythonFinder.ts`** — Add `winpython = 'WinPython'` to the
`NativePythonEnvironmentKind` enum to match the value emitted by PET's
`pet-winpython` crate.
- **`managers/builtin/utils.ts`** — Add
`NativePythonEnvironmentKind.winpython` to the `refreshPythons`
allowlist so WinPython environments surface through the System Python
manager.

WinPython falls through to the `default` branch in `getKindName()`, so
it displays as `Python <version>` — consistent with other undecorated
system Pythons.

> [!WARNING]
>
> <details>
> <summary>Firewall rules blocked me from connecting to one or more
addresses (expand for details)</summary>
>
> #### I tried to connect to the following addresses, but was blocked by
firewall rules:
>
> - `https://api.github.com/graphql`
> - Triggering command: `/usr/bin/gh gh issue list --state open --limit
5 --json number,title,labels` (http block)
>
> If you need me to access, download, or install something from one of
these locations, you can either:
>
> - Configure [Actions setup
steps](https://gh.io/copilot/actions-setup-steps) to set up my
environment, which run before the firewall is enabled
> - Add the appropriate URLs or hosts to the custom allowlist in this
repository's [Copilot coding agent
settings](https://github.com/microsoft/vscode-python-environments/settings/copilot/coding_agent)
(admins only)
>
> </details>

<!-- START COPILOT CODING AGENT TIPS -->
---

Mobile](https://gh.io/cca-mobile-docs), available on iOS and Android.

commit.message:
Add AstronClaw/Loomy logo carousel to homepage hero section (#6)

* Initial plan

* feat: add AstronClaw/Loomy logo carousel to homepage hero section

Add HeroCarousel.vue component that alternates between AstronClaw and
Loomy logos with auto-rotation (5s interval), fade transitions, and
dot indicators. Each slide shows a contextual link in the top-right:
- AstronClaw slide: "体验云端 AstronClaw" / "Try Cloud AstronClaw"
- Loomy slide: "下载 Loomy 桌面端" / "Download Loomy Desktop"

Links open in new tabs. Component is i18n-aware via useData().lang.

Co-authored-by: FenjuFu <92919259+FenjuFu@users.noreply.github.com>

* refactor: rename timer variable to carouselTimer for clarity

Co-authored-by: FenjuFu <92919259+FenjuFu@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: FenjuFu <92919259+FenjuFu@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: net_r_realized includes full trade outcome + engine-specific PTP params

Two bugs in simulate_trade_outcome():

1. net_r_realized = realized_r (PTP portion only)
   Should be total_r (PTP + remaining position result)
   Effect: losses showed -0.05R (commission only) instead of -1.05R
           wins showed 0.45R (PTP) instead of actual total outcome
   Fix: replace round(realized_r,3) -> round(total_r,3) on all exit paths

2. PTP params hardcoded to engine_params['judas_swing']
   Should use signal.engine_name to get correct engine's partial_tp_rr/vol
   Effect: ict_enigma (ptp_rr=1.75) and ict_venom (ptp_rr=1.0) both used
           judas_swing defaults instead of their optimizer-tuned values
   Fix: ep = settings.engine_params.get(signal.engine_name, {})

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix AI chat window auto-opening over page content (#4)

Fix mobile screen adaptation: nav overlay, feature cards, chat widget (#3)

* Initial plan

* fix: optimize mobile screen adaptation for navigation, features, and chat widget

- Fix CustomToggles.vue: use :global(.VPNavScreen .selector) instead of
  :global(.VPNavScreen) .selector to prevent scoped CSS from incorrectly
  compiling to .VPNavScreen { display: none }, which blocked the hamburger
  menu overlay from rendering
- Restore hamburger menu on mobile (<768px) by scoping the forced nav
  display to medium screens (769px-1279px) only
- Add mobile-specific styles for feature cards to use full width
- Add mobile hero text size adjustments
- Collapse chat widget by default on mobile to avoid overlapping content

Co-authored-by: FenjuFu <92919259+FenjuFu@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: FenjuFu <92919259+FenjuFu@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: 3D grid visualization, interactive 2D topology, SSE streaming

3D Command View (/grid-3d):
- Interactive 3D topology with Three.js/React Three Fiber
- Station-specific models: generator (arc reactor core, cooling tower,
  smokestack with animated steam), solar farm (20 tilted PV panels,
  inverter), load substations (HV transformers, surge arresters)
- Catenary physics transmission lines (y = a·cosh(x/a))
- Animated power flow particles (sphere-based, speed ∝ power magnitude)
- Click-to-inspect: detailed telemetry/status overlay panel
- Hover effects with subtle scale animation
- Pulsing status glow rings on foundation pads
- Blinking aviation warning lights
- Auto-start simulation on page visit

2D Dashboard Upgrades:
- Draggable topology nodes in React Flow
- Click bus node → detailed right-side inspector panel
- Click transmission line → flow info modal
- Type-specific icons (⚡ generator, ☀️ solar, 🏭 load)
- Animated edges with flow dots and MW labels
- Attack/healing pulse animations on nodes

Data Streaming:
- New SSE hook (useSSEGridData) replaces 1s polling
- Persistent EventSource connection with auto-reconnect
- Shield status now published via EventBus
- Both 2D and 3D pages use SSE

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

chore: add Makefile with project and CI commands

Adds a Makefile covering setup (install, keygen, migrate), code quality
(lint, format, format-check), testing (all suites + per-suite targets),
server run modes, Docker helpers, and a `ci` target that mirrors the
GitHub Actions CI pipeline.

Co-Authored-By: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(monitoring): add Prometheus + Grafana MCP tool usage metrics

- Add prometheus-client dependency
- src/agent_trust/metrics.py: define tool_calls_total (counter),
  tool_duration_seconds (histogram), tool_errors_total (counter)
- src/agent_trust/instrument.py: @track_tool_call async decorator
  applied to all 15 MCP tools via server.py registrations
- Mount /metrics endpoint on the streamable-http Starlette app
- Add METRICS_ENABLED config setting (default: true)
- docker-compose: add prometheus (9090) and grafana (3001) services
  with 30-day retention and auto-provisioned dashboard
- monitoring/: prometheus scrape config + Grafana datasource,
  dashboard provider, and starter dashboard JSON
- .env.example: add METRICS_ENABLED and GRAFANA_PASSWORD
- README.md: add Monitoring section with metrics table and URLs

Co-Authored-By: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: sendspin-bt-bridge
repository.description: A Bluetooth bridge for Music Assistant — connects your Bluetooth speakers to the MA Sendspin protocol. Runs as a Docker container, a Home Assistant addon, or a native LXC container on Proxmox VE/OpenWrt

commit.message:
Fix color-mix() fallbacks, rename ambiguous 'id' variable, use nullish coalescing for maxTilt

- Add static rgba() fallback lines before every color-mix() usage in .brand-card:hover,
  .card-brand-name, and .card-tag so older browsers (Safari <16.2, Firefox <113) degrade
  gracefully while modern browsers use the brand-color-dynamic version
- Rename 'id' → 'sectionId' in initNavbar() for clarity
- Use maxTilt ?? 12 (nullish coalescing) instead of maxTilt || 12 to correctly handle
  falsy-but-intentional values

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: advision-portfolio
repository.description: A personal freelance advertising website featuring 40 brand ad campaigns, portfolio showcase, and client contact form. Built with HTML, CSS & Vanilla JS. Deployed on GitHub Pages

commit.message:
Create AdVision freelance advertising agency website

- index.html: Full semantic HTML5 — navbar, hero (100vh, 7 orbs, ticker),
  stats bar, 40 brand cards, 6 portfolio flip cards, 6 service cards,
  testimonials, contact form, footer, portfolio modal
- style.css: Design system via CSS custom properties (Inter + Syne fonts),
  glass-blur navbar, staggered hero animations, brand card grid with
  color-mix() glow, 3D flip portfolio cards, service hover reveal,
  responsive carousel dots, SVG checkmark success animation,
  prefers-reduced-motion support, CSS tilt via custom properties
- script.js: Navbar scroll class + IntersectionObserver active links,
  hamburger overlay with focus management, stats count-up easeOutExpo,
  CSS-var-driven 3D tilt (brand + service cards), portfolio modal with
  focus trap, mobile testimonials carousel (auto-rotate 4s), contact
  form validation + Formspree fetch with loading/success states,
  scroll reveal IntersectionObserver

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
chore(infra): fix port conflicts and expand env documentation

- Remap host ports to avoid collision with AgentAuth stack:
  postgres 5432->5433, redis 6379->6380, app 8000->8140
- Restrict agent-trust app binding to loopback (127.0.0.1)
- Sync DATABASE_URL and REDIS_URL in .env.example to new ports
- Add all missing env vars: ENVIRONMENT, SIGNING_KEY_PASSWORD,
  TLS_CERT_PATH/KEY_PATH, ATTESTATION_CUMULATIVE_REVOCATION_THRESHOLD,
  DISPUTE_FILER_*, RATE_LIMIT_*, SYBIL_*, docker-compose POSTGRES_*/REDIS_*

Co-Authored-By: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.description: A professional Emergency Alert System (EAS) platform for monitoring, broadcasting, and verifying NOAA and IPAWS alerts

commit.message:
feat: Add LED sign Dots/Pixel-Art, RSS Feeds, WYSIWYG simulator (v2.62.0)

- Add feedparser==6.0.11 to requirements.txt
- Add LEDRSSFeed and LEDRSSItem models to app_core/models.py
- Add send_dots_graphic() M-Protocol Type I frame method to Alpha9120CController
- Add RSS CRUD + fetch + send API routes to webapp/routes_led.py
- Add /api/led/dots pixel-art send route
- Create Alembic migration 20260319_add_led_rss_feeds for new tables
- Overhaul templates/led_control.html:
  * WYSIWYG CSS-animated LED sign simulator panel replacing static preview
  * Layout Preset buttons (Static, Header+Scroll, Alert, Ticker)
  * Dots/Pixel-Art tab with interactive 160x16 canvas, shift/invert/fill tools,
    text-to-dots generator, quick patterns, and canvas preview
  * RSS Feeds tab with add/fetch/delete feeds and item selection for sign send
  * Full set of M-Protocol animation CSS classes for all 20 display modes
  * Per-line effect pill badges and speed modifier classes
- Bump VERSION 2.61.2 → 2.62.0
- Update CHANGELOG.md with v2.62.0 release notes

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
